task: Set Bulgarian as the default language in Angular (PrimeNG 22) and React (MUI 9) UIs, and update the dev-mode household reference default from 'HH-DEV-1' to 'АП. 1' in API config.

key_reasoning.reason: 5 files touched across 3 sub-projects (app.config.ts, app.ts, App.tsx, appsettings.json, Program.cs) — maps to M (4-6 files) even though each change is small and targeted.

Three distinct sub-projects are involved (Angular UI, React UI, .NET API), but every change is a configuration-level addition or string replacement with no new business logic or components. Existing patterns fully cover all change sites.

Named files, named lines, and before/after values are explicit. The only open question — whether the PrimeNG DatePicker dateFormat override in reservations.component.ts should be changed — is explicitly scoped as a product/UX decision, not a technical unknown.
